name: io.github.beeswaxpat/chronoverify
description: Verify a photo's capture time and provenance: C2PA validation, EXIF/XMP, and pixel forensics.

environmentVariables.description: Your ChronoVerify API key (cv_live_...). Optional: omit to use the free, rate-limited public path.
environmentVariables.name: CHRONOVERIFY_API_KEY
